remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target land card in your graveyard
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return up to one target land card from your graveyard to your hand.
CARDNAME deals 1 damage to any target.

params.Name: Emblem — Wrenn and Six
params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have retrace." (You may cast instant and sorcery cards from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying their other costs.)
